name: Brussels Sprouts with Bacon
tagline: Crisp-fried brussels sprouts with bacon, garlic, lemon
highlight: Sears, then steams off — crispy edges, soft middle, no soy

hero.alt: Brussels sprouts pan-seared with bacon bits
hero.caption: brussels & bacon — crisp

healthFacts: Brussels sprouts are crucifers — sulforaphane and vitamin K powerhouse.
Searing cut-side down browns the natural sugars and tames the cabbage notes.

steps.title: Trim and halve
steps.detail: Trim stem ends and remove loose outer leaves. Halve through the root.
steps.tip: Halving exposes flat surface for browning. Whole sprouts steam.

steps.title: Render the bacon
steps.detail: Cook bacon in a wide skillet over medium 5 min until crisp. Pull bacon out; leave fat in pan.
steps.tip: Cold pan, cold bacon, medium heat — slowly renders fat without burning.

steps.title: Sear sprouts cut-side down
steps.detail: Add 1 tbsp olive oil to the bacon fat. Place sprouts cut-side down in a single layer. Don't move 5 min until deep brown.
steps.tip: Don't peek. Deep brown is the goal.

steps.title: Toss and finish
steps.detail: Toss sprouts to brown the other sides, 3 min. Add garlic 30 sec. Return bacon, squeeze lemon, salt, pepper.
steps.tip: Lemon at the end brightens the bacon's saltiness.

media.alt: Brussels sprouts with bacon and lemon
media.caption: toss and finish
